title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 285.100 - Willful failure to pay a misdemeanor
text:
285.100.  Willful failure to pay a misdemeanor. — Any employer who promises in writing to make payments to an employee retirement or welfare plan, either by contract with an individual employee, by a collective bargaining agreement, or by agreement with the employee retirement or welfare plan, and who willfully fails to make the payment within sixty days after they become due and payable is guilty of a misdemeanor.
(L. 1974 S.B. 409 § l)
